CustomField.description: This will display a string of text with dates and days of the path
CustomField.formula:
/* Path_Date_All_Block__c Path_Date_Order_Started__c Days_Order_to_Hold__c Path_Date_Order_Hold__c Days_Hold_to_Clear__c Path_Date_Order_Clear__c Days_Clear_to_Global_Delivery__c Path_Date_Global_Delivery__c Days_Global_Delivery_to_Read_to_Ship__c Path_Date_Ready_for_Shipping__c Days_Ready_to_Ship_to_Shipped__c Path_Date_Order_Shipped__c Days_Open_to_Ship__c
"Path Name: " & LPAD(TEXT(DAY(Field_name__c)),2,"0") & "-" & CASE(MONTH(Field_name__c), 1, "JAN", 2, "FEB", 3, "MAR", 4, "APR", 5, "MAY", 6, "JUN", 7, "JUL", 8, "AUG", 9, "SEP", 10, "OCT", 11, "NOV", 12, "DEC", "None") & "-" & TEXT(YEAR(Field_name__c)) & " (" & TEXT(field2_name__c) & "d) > " & */
LPAD(TEXT(DAY(Path_Date_Order_Started__c)),2,"0") & "-" & CASE(MONTH(Path_Date_Order_Started__c), 1, "JAN", 2, "FEB", 3, "MAR", 4, "APR", 5, "MAY", 6, "JUN", 7, "JUL", 8, "AUG", 9, "SEP", 10, "OCT", 11, "NOV", 12, "DEC", "None") & "-" & TEXT(YEAR(Path_Date_Order_Started__c)) & " Order Started (" & TEXT(Days_Order_to_Hold__c ) & " days) > " & BR() &
LPAD(TEXT(DAY(Path_Date_Order_Hold__c )),2,"0") & "-" & CASE(MONTH(Path_Date_Order_Hold__c ), 1, "JAN", 2, "FEB", 3, "MAR", 4, "APR", 5, "MAY", 6, "JUN", 7, "JUL", 8, "AUG", 9, "SEP", 10, "OCT", 11, "NOV", 12, "DEC", "None") & "-" & TEXT(YEAR(Path_Date_Order_Hold__c )) & " Processing Hold (" & TEXT(Days_Hold_to_Clear__c ) & " days) > " & BR() &
LPAD(TEXT(DAY(Path_Date_Order_Clear__c )),2,"0") & "-" & CASE(MONTH(Path_Date_Order_Clear__c ), 1, "JAN", 2, "FEB", 3, "MAR", 4, "APR", 5, "MAY", 6, "JUN", 7, "JUL", 8, "AUG", 9, "SEP", 10, "OCT", 11, "NOV", 12, "DEC", "None") & "-" & TEXT(YEAR(Path_Date_Order_Clear__c )) & " Order Clear (" & TEXT(Days_Clear_to_Global_Delivery__c ) & " days) > " & BR() &
LPAD(TEXT(DAY(Path_Date_Global_Delivery__c )),2,"0") & "-" & CASE(MONTH(Path_Date_Global_Delivery__c ), 1, "JAN", 2, "FEB", 3, "MAR", 4, "APR", 5, "MAY", 6, "JUN", 7, "JUL", 8, "AUG", 9, "SEP", 10, "OCT", 11, "NOV", 12, "DEC", "None") & "-" & TEXT(YEAR(Path_Date_Global_Delivery__c )) & " Mfg Date Committed (" & TEXT(Days_Global_Delivery_to_Read_to_Ship__c ) & " days) > " & BR() &
LPAD(TEXT(DAY(Path_Date_Ready_for_Shipping__c )),2,"0") & "-" & CASE(MONTH(Path_Date_Ready_for_Shipping__c ), 1, "JAN", 2, "FEB", 3, "MAR", 4, "APR", 5, "MAY", 6, "JUN", 7, "JUL", 8, "AUG", 9, "SEP", 10, "OCT", 11, "NOV", 12, "DEC", "None") & "-" & TEXT(YEAR(Path_Date_Ready_for_Shipping__c )) & " Ready for Shipping (" & TEXT(Days_Ready_to_Ship_to_Shipped__c ) & " days) > " & BR() &
LPAD(TEXT(DAY(Path_Date_Order_Shipped__c)),2,"0") & "-" & CASE(MONTH(Path_Date_Order_Shipped__c), 1, "JAN", 2, "FEB", 3, "MAR", 4, "APR", 5, "MAY", 6, "JUN", 7, "JUL", 8, "AUG", 9, "SEP", 10, "OCT", 11, "NOV", 12, "DEC", "None") & "-" & TEXT(YEAR(Path_Date_Order_Shipped__c)) & " Order Shipped (" & TEXT(Days_Open_to_Ship__c ) & " overall days)"
CustomField.inlineHelpText: A snapshot of when the dates where received and how long until we received each date. (this is not using the actual value of the date)
CustomField.label: fxPathDays
